title: Verify Trial Corner is not shown to users who consumed content within 5 minutes
description: Test that experiment targeting correctly excludes users who started consumption within 5 minutes of trial activation
preconditions: User activates trial and starts consumption within 5 minutes

steps.description: 2. Start consuming content within 5 minutes of activation

expected_result: User does not see Trial Corner widget. They are excluded from the experiment as per mutually exclusive design
